body.title: Vetinari: LLM decomposition of directive into cc_queue tickets
body.result: decompose_directive() with injectable LLM, _call_llm_or (OR/gpt-4o-mini), _parse_subtasks, _write_tickets_to_queue; retry-once on parse fail; state pending→active + child_ticket_ids; 12 tests
body.intention: I intend that Vetinari calls an LLM to decompose a pending directive into subtasks and writes each to cc_queue with the correct worker tag.
body.description:
Vetinari has no LLM call and no cc_queue integration. The autonomous directive vision requires him to break a natural-language goal into work units.

Add decompose_directive(directive_id) to VetinariDevice: load the directive text, call inference (OR via DickSimnel's ToolLoop or direct call — prefer cheapest model capable of structured output), receive JSON list of {title, description, worker, tags, size} subtasks, write each to cc_queue via cc_queue.py add, store child_ticket_ids in the directive flat-file state. Move directive from pending → active.

**Affected files:** devices/vetinari/device.py (add decompose_directive(), _call_llm()), devices/vetinari/decompose_prompt.txt (NEW — system prompt), lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py (read-only — use existing add command), tests/test_vetinari_decompose.py (NEW)
**Design rules:** no SQLite; LLM call via OR (cheapest capable model); cc_queue writes via cc_queue.py subprocess call; directive state in flat-file JSON
**Scope boundary:** IN — LLM decompose call, ticket writing, directive state transition pending→active, child_ticket_ids list; OUT — clarification loop, routing logic, progress tracking
**Completion criteria:** decompose_directive('test-id') with a test directive produces ≥1 ticket in cc_queue; directive state file shows active status + child_ticket_ids; LLM parse errors are handled gracefully (retry once, then escalate); 6+ tests covering: decompose produces tickets, state transitions, LLM error handling, malformed LLM response, child IDs recorded
